but a contemplative life without practice , be like unto Rachel , Jacob be wife , beautiful , bright-sighted , but barren . it be good therefore to have Rachel be beautiful face to be second with leahs fruitful womb . by contemplation and consideration , Solomon get much of his wisdom , as appear by his ecclesiaste , which by some be very apt call solomon soliloquy . saint Basil leave his friend and acquaintance , retire himself into a wilderness , that he may the more devout serve God , and delight himself in holy meditation . and saint Hierome comfort a young hermit , bid he look up to heaven , and take a few turn in paradise , by his meditation ;
